turns.speaker: user
turns.text: give me 2 real key characteristics about real business: LPL financial

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure, here are two key characteristics of LPL Financial:

1. Independent Broker-Dealer: LPL Financial is an independent broker-dealer which means that it is not owned by a particular company or financial institution. This independence grants LPL greater flexibility in creating and offering financial products that meet the needs of its clients, as it is not bound by the policies and requirements of a parent organization.

2. Focus on technology: LPL Financial has invested heavily in technology, providing its advisors with a suite of digital tools that enable them to efficiently manage their practices and provide better service to their clients. This tech focus has allowed LPL to remain competitive in an industry that is increasingly reliant on technology and digital solutions.
